description: Baby I Love Daddy Sleepsuit. Share a goodnight cuddle with your loving baby in this adorable I Love Daddy onesie! Designed by Harry Bear, this white cotton baby grow is dotted with stars and showcases the slogan 'I Love Daddy'. This comfy all in one has cuffs for added cosiness and a popper fastening. Love sleep time with this onesie for your cuddly baby! Finished with a hand-tied ribbon to make the perfect gift!
